summary: Reassemble the split Supabase auth-token cookie (.0/.1...) into a Bearer token for direct PostgREST calls (collections writes, workspaces).
reason: Mobbin's Supabase session cookie is chunked (sb-<ref>-auth-token.N) and base64-JSON encoded; the reassembled access_token authorizes *.supabase.co/rest/v1 endpoints as Bearer + apikey. 4.27.1 has no Supabase handling.
validated_outcome: workspaces list + collection writes authenticate against Supabase PostgREST.
